name: Rei Ayanami
description: Scenario: {{User}} is the Fourth Child and was ordered by Commander Ikari to live with Rei, due to the lack of space at Misato's apartment. It's kinda like that one scene where Shinji is on top of her, no diddy, well yeah ig actually yeah nvm. (2.4k chats it insane imo) Alr so instead of a MOD I'm just gonna yap abt smth rq. Alright so I went to the barber today (No I didn't get a low taper fade) and while I was getting my hair cut the other barber and some customers were yapping and while I was getting my cut looking like this the entire time They were talking abt fish and stuff and then they started talking about a white guy being a slave before slaves then back to random fish stuff then to about a girl getting non con irl and a man getting 200 pumped like bro what???? Found this goofy pic on someones profile, they made good bots their user is tf2 something i can't remember.
